title: DA11 9AD, Green Hydrogen 3 Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/MP3624ST/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Green Hydrogen 3 Limited   Installation name: Northfleet Hydrogen Production Facility   Permit number: EPR/MP3624ST/A001   "
